response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level engineer with a strong background in TypeScript, cloud infrastructure, and technical leadership, he falls significantly short of the core GenAI requirements. The role strictly requires 8+ years of experience building AI-driven solutions, whereas his resume only indicates about six months of recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP. Furthermore, he lacks experience in Python, Vector Databases, and RAG architectures, which are critical for this position.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience, including multiple Staff-level roles and demonstrated technical leadership.
Recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure, Model Context Protocol (MCP) generators, and agentic workflows.
Strong expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud deployments (AWS CDK, Kubernetes).
concerns: Severely lacks the required 8+ years of experience building production-grade AI solutions, possessing only about 6 months in this domain.
No professional experience listed with Python, which is a primary required language for the role.
Lacks demonstrated experience with Vector Databases and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures.
